description: A traveler needs to book a multi-city trip: from London to Paris, then Paris to Rome, and finally Rome back to London.

nodes.task_description: Gather the dates for each leg of the journey.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all necessary dates for the multi-city itinerary.

nodes.task_description: Search for flights for each segment of the trip (LHR-CDG, CDG-FCO, FCO-LHR).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds available flights for all three legs of the journey.

nodes.task_description: Create a single booking containing all three flight segments and provide a total price.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully books the complete itinerary and provides one booking reference.
